## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Tribe AI and GrowthX to discuss ongoing projects, client updates, and team coordination.](https://fathom.video/share/isfYLjnsCc4UWyMt7mDbo4j19W91WpnN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Web stacks client content volume clarified: 10 new articles + 5 refreshes per week, not 20 as previously thought](https://fathom.video/share/isfYLjnsCc4UWyMt7mDbo4j19W91WpnN?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Team experiencing high workload with multiple client meetings and onboarding new team members](https://fathom.video/share/isfYLjnsCc4UWyMt7mDbo4j19W91WpnN?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Andrej working remotely, returning home tomorrow; team adjusting to remote work lifestyle](https://fathom.video/share/isfYLjnsCc4UWyMt7mDbo4j19W91WpnN?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Potential new team member (unnamed) may shadow Andrej on accounts, possibly joining full-time in November](https://fathom.video/share/isfYLjnsCc4UWyMt7mDbo4j19W91WpnN?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)

## Topics

### Client Content Production

  - [Web stacks client initially received higher volume (20 articles/week) to catch up, now stabilized at 10 new + 5 refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/isfYLjnsCc4UWyMt7mDbo4j19W91WpnN?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [Results from increased volume are showing positive impact](https://fathom.video/share/isfYLjnsCc4UWyMt7mDbo4j19W91WpnN?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Team to send update on published articles, metrics (20 visitors, impressions) once indexed](https://fathom.video/share/isfYLjnsCc4UWyMt7mDbo4j19W91WpnN?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [Currently in Week 3 for Web stacks, planning to publish 15 articles this week to catch up](https://fathom.video/share/isfYLjnsCc4UWyMt7mDbo4j19W91WpnN?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)

### Team Workload and Coordination

  - [Multiple back-to-back meetings for team members (Jimmy: 2 with Andrej, 2 with Fatik)](https://fathom.video/share/isfYLjnsCc4UWyMt7mDbo4j19W91WpnN?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Andrej has 3 meetings tomorrow, including a 1-on-1 and call with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/isfYLjnsCc4UWyMt7mDbo4j19W91WpnN?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Challenge of onboarding multiple new hires in succession, leading to information management issues](https://fathom.video/share/isfYLjnsCc4UWyMt7mDbo4j19W91WpnN?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Suggestion to increase team sync frequency from monthly to bi-weekly for better communication](https://fathom.video/share/isfYLjnsCc4UWyMt7mDbo4j19W91WpnN?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)

### Ongoing Projects

  - [Boost My School project starting soon](https://fathom.video/share/isfYLjnsCc4UWyMt7mDbo4j19W91WpnN?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Marcel inquiring about readiness for next project](https://fathom.video/share/isfYLjnsCc4UWyMt7mDbo4j19W91WpnN?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [Potential new account in discussion, considering having new team member shadow Andrej](https://fathom.video/share/isfYLjnsCc4UWyMt7mDbo4j19W91WpnN?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)

### Remote Work and Travel

  - [Andrej working remotely, returning home tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/isfYLjnsCc4UWyMt7mDbo4j19W91WpnN?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)

  - [Team adapting to remote work lifestyle, offering flexibility in work locations](https://fathom.video/share/isfYLjnsCc4UWyMt7mDbo4j19W91WpnN?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)

### Webflow Usage

  - [Andrej's first time using Webflow for articles](https://fathom.video/share/isfYLjnsCc4UWyMt7mDbo4j19W91WpnN?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Initial learning curve with sidebar/navbar, but manageable after practice](https://fathom.video/share/isfYLjnsCc4UWyMt7mDbo4j19W91WpnN?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Suggestion to duplicate existing pieces and swap information for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/isfYLjnsCc4UWyMt7mDbo4j19W91WpnN?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
